title: 2026 Oscars Winners Report
text: One Battle After Another dominated the ceremony, securing Best Picture, Best Director, and several technical awards. The film arrived with the second-highest nomination count at 13 total. Sinners set a record with 16 nominations—the most ever for any film. It claimed Best Actor for Michael B. Jordan and Best Cinematography, making Autumn Durald Arkapaw the first woman to win that award. Notable Winners: Best Supporting Actor: Sean Penn, One Battle After Another. Best Actress: Jessie Buckley, Hamnet. Best Director: Paul Thomas Anderson, One Battle After Another. Best Original Screenplay: Ryan Coogler, Sinners. Historic Moments: The Academy introduced Best Casting as its first new category in 25 years. Cassandra Kulukundis won for her work on One Battle After Another. Conan O'Brien returned as host for a second consecutive year at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles. All the Empty Rooms, a documentary short based on CBS News correspondent Steve Hartman's project documenting the rooms of children killed in school shootings, won Best Documentary Short.
